description: Promotional content featuring bundled meal offers with multiple items at a fixed discount price, emphasizing value and satisfaction through complementary food pairings.
structural_recipe: Lead with equation format showing item + item = price (e.g., 'وجبة + حلا = 16 ريال'). Use emoji for visual emphasis (💸, 🔥, 🍦, 🍔). Include product name with descriptive tagline highlighting complementary benefits (meal fills you, dessert satisfies). Add urgency/exclusivity markers (كودو الوضع غير). Mention availability (متوفر في فروع مختا). Use casual, enthusiastic tone with Arabic colloquialisms.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers respond strongly to transparent pricing equations and tangible value propositions. Bundle messaging appeals to budget-consciousness and family-oriented dining culture. The combination of main + dessert reflects traditional meal completion expectations. Emoji and exclamation marks create festive, approachable tone that feels personal rather than corporate. Location mention drives foot traffic by reducing friction.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must reflect local market benchmarks; perceived value varies by region within Saudi Arabia
Halal/Islamic dietary compliance implicit—mention if ingredients are certified halal for sensitive audiences
Discount framing must align with brand positioning; deep discounts may harm premium brand perception
cultural_constraints: Use Arabic-first messaging for primary audience; English secondary if included
Avoid imagery conflicting with conservative social values
Family-oriented framing preferred over individual consumption
